name: storagesaver
description: Read-only Mac disk usage explorer with plain-English AI explanations and built-in safety knowledge. Scan, understand, reclaim.

scripts.test: node --check bin/storagesaver.js && node --check src/scan.js && node --check src/classify.js && node --check src/notes.js && node --check src/annotate.js && node --check skill/watcher.js

author: Scott Nelson
